failures.issue: Leftover matching content found in kept ranges: [11.1s–18.0s]; [18.0s–28.4s]

notes: Both operations are satisfactorily addressed. The 'person:A' face-cluster label appearing in visual descriptions alongside 'person:B / Woody Roseland' descriptors is consistent with a face-clustering artifact for the same individual; the transcript and story flow confirm a single continuous speaker throughout the kept range. The kept transcript flows coherently from the opening provocation through the balloon/inflation punchline with no orphaned references or broken context.
